rewrite.text:
PROVE proposition  
BEGIN  
  FACT h1: n + 0 = n [BY definition]  
  FACT h2: 0 = 0 [BY base case]  
  INDUCTION n  
    SINCE n = 0  
      THEREFORE n + 0 = n [BY base]  
    INDUCTIVE_CASE  
      FACT h3: n + 0 = n [BY hypothesis]  
      SINCE n = S m + 0  
        THEREFORE n + 0 = m + 0 = m [BY induction]  
  CONCLUDE: n + 0 = n [QED]  
END

END
